programme.title: 1,000 Ways To Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo takes us around the world to a restaurant with a bird's eye view of Singapore, as diners feast on fresh seafood fifty-seven storeys above the city.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life
programme.desc: Instead of sticking to a single concept, these homes are decorated according to the owner's personal tastes. We'll showcase homes where you can see the ultimate expression of personal style.

programme.title: Murder At The Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: All Fixed Up In An Empty Village
programme.desc: Excitement is in the air, but before the team can fully bask in the moment, fate calls them to action. To win their desired home, they must first conquer the ultimate challenge: the Empty Home Quiz.

programme.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programme.desc: Junho, who had chosen a ₩7,500-per-night room during their last Vietnam trip, is back as the lodging dokbakja for their Thailand adventure. With both excitement and anxiety, the Dokbakz follow Junho.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Derek and Chauncey take on a house that was abandoned by previous flippers! Left with holes in the roof, termite damage and a dilapidated porch this house pushes their skills, and budget, to the limit.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: 4 Michelin star chef and MasterChef judge Jean-Christophe Novelli sets the first Pressure Test of the season with his 1992 dessert ‘Jack in the Box', which helped him secure his first Michelin star.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Chrissie and Jamie have an active outdoor lifestyle. They want a home where they can just wake up and jump in the water for a swim, and the home must be a place their three adult sons will want to visit.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Deborah cooks a dish inspired by American meatloaf, blending the recipe with an English-style Wellington. She adds a Southern favourite, sorghum mustard, and prepares smothered potatoes.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy S1E3 -Turk-Ish Leek Burgers & Peach Crumb Bars
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Team is back where it all began in the Jewel Oaks neighbourhood, where Duke and Keith first flipped a house together. Will they manage to restore this nightmare from the '60s as successfully as last time.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.sub-title: Lucca Style Pesto Pasta Or Trenette Al Pesto
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a classic pesto sauce using fresh basil, roasted pistachios and pine nuts, combined with pecorino and Parmigiano cheeses. She then cooks it 'Lucca Style', with potatoes and green beans.

programme.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Pattaya, heavy rain pours down relentlessly. But the Dokbakz don't care. Rain or shine, they go all in. They head to a buggy car experience centre, where they can roam through nature.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2: Simone's Revenge
programme.desc: After escaping the murderous clutches of Simone, Monica is making a fresh start as the host of a primetime TV program. Simone, suffering from amnesia, sees Monica on TV, her memories come rushing back.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Team is back where it all began in the Jewel Oaks neighbourhood, where Duke and Keith first flipped a house together. Will they manage to restore this nightmare from the '60s as successfully as last time.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.sub-title: Lucca Style Pesto Pasta Or Trenette Al Pesto
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a classic pesto sauce using fresh basil, roasted pistachios and pine nuts, combined with pecorino and Parmigiano cheeses. She then cooks it 'Lucca Style', with potatoes and green beans.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Deborah cooks a dish inspired by American meatloaf, blending the recipe with an English-style Wellington. She adds a Southern favourite, sorghum mustard, and prepares smothered potatoes.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy S1E3 -Turk-Ish Leek Burgers & Peach Crumb Bars
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways To Dine
programme.desc: Sometimes the best meals are kept locked behind closed doors, but in this episode host Michael Yo has the keys to some of the most special and secret dining spaces around.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Murder At The Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Deborah cooks a dish inspired by American meatloaf, blending the recipe with an English-style Wellington. She adds a Southern favourite, sorghum mustard, and prepares smothered potatoes.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy S1E3 -Turk-Ish Leek Burgers & Peach Crumb Bars
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.desc: Inspired by international film star and cookbook author Sophia Loren's recipe for eggplant parmigiana, Rachael makes the dish in the proper Italian style, with aged Parmigiano Reggiano cheese.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: 4 Michelin star chef and MasterChef judge Jean-Christophe Novelli sets the first Pressure Test of the season with his 1992 dessert ‘Jack in the Box', which helped him secure his first Michelin star.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Tired of the busy city life, Bert has finally convinced Bruce to leave it all behind for water, grass and relaxation. However, Bert has high expectations for their new home.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways To Dine
programme.desc: Sometimes the best meals are kept locked behind closed doors, but in this episode host Michael Yo has the keys to some of the most special and secret dining spaces around.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life
programme.desc: Today's theme is 'Hotel Stay vs. Countryside Stay: The Accommodation Showdown!' For those who are passionate about interior design, places encountered during travels can provide a wealth of inspiration.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2: Simone's Revenge
programme.desc: After escaping the murderous clutches of Simone, Monica is making a fresh start as the host of a primetime TV program. Simone, suffering from amnesia, sees Monica on TV, her memories come rushing back.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.

programme.title: All Fixed Up In An Empty Village
programme.desc: After the intense battle for empty homes, special missions are assigned to the four. Enter Yoo Jung-soo, the “spatial planning master”, who reinterprets the village revival project.

programme.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programme.desc: The next morning, the Dokbakz head to the pier for their luxury yacht tour. They enjoy the vast sea in a moment of relaxation, but the calm doesn't last long.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Derek sees big profit potential when he buys a crumbling old house in a nice neighborhood. Chauncey is skeptical of the half-finished work and the small square footage. Was this all a big mistake.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It's a two-round Immunity challenge today. In Round 1, one ‘champion' per team cooks, with the winner of Round 1 then taking their teammates into Round 2, and out into the garden to cook for Immunity.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Sean moved to the East Coast to be with Candace, but living in her bachelorette apartment is becoming cramped. They are searching for a seaside home that accommodates both of their needs.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Lomo Saltado With Pork And Sweet Potatoes
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece puts a Southern twist on the classic Peruvian dish lomo saltado by using pork and adding sweet potato fries.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programme.sub-title: Lamb Meatballs With Herby Couscous & Cardamom Snickerdoodles
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team gets recruited for a big-money flip on a lake-front property. Although the potential profit is huge, the outdated layout and termite damage make this dusty time capsule a Mid-Century Mishap.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.desc: Political commentator and Rachael's friend, S.E. Cupp joins Rachael in her upstate kitchen to learn how to prepare Chicken Scarpiello, a classic Italian American chicken dish that is baked and sauteed.

programme.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programme.desc: Junho, who had chosen a ₩7,500-per-night room during their last Vietnam trip, is back as the lodging dokbakja for their Thailand adventure. With both excitement and anxiety, the Dokbakz follow Junho.

programme.title: The Neighbor Who Saw Too Much
programme.desc: A grounded teen becomes convinced that her hot new neighbour is actually a dangerous killer. When no-one else believes her, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team gets recruited for a big-money flip on a lake-front property. Although the potential profit is huge, the outdated layout and termite damage make this dusty time capsule a Mid-Century Mishap.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.desc: Political commentator and Rachael's friend, S.E. Cupp joins Rachael in her upstate kitchen to learn how to prepare Chicken Scarpiello, a classic Italian American chicken dish that is baked and sauteed.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Lomo Saltado With Pork And Sweet Potatoes
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece puts a Southern twist on the classic Peruvian dish lomo saltado by using pork and adding sweet potato fries.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programme.sub-title: Lamb Meatballs With Herby Couscous & Cardamom Snickerdoodles
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways To Dine
programme.desc: Dining out takes flight into the world of fantasy when host Michael Yo shows us that make-believe experiences can be really tasty. First stop is a restaurant in New York City's Financial District.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2: Simone's Revenge
programme.desc: After escaping the murderous clutches of Simone, Monica is making a fresh start as the host of a primetime TV program. Simone, suffering from amnesia, sees Monica on TV, her memories come rushing back.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Lomo Saltado With Pork And Sweet Potatoes
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece puts a Southern twist on the classic Peruvian dish lomo saltado by using pork and adding sweet potato fries.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programme.sub-title: Lamb Meatballs With Herby Couscous & Cardamom Snickerdoodles
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.desc: To celebrate her wedding anniversary, Rachael prepares her famous beet risotto, made with roasted beets, red wine, onions, ricotta salata and more.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It's a two-round Immunity challenge today. In Round 1, one ‘champion' per team cooks, with the winner of Round 1 then taking their teammates into Round 2, and out into the garden to cook for Immunity.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Chrissie and Jamie have an active outdoor lifestyle. They want a home where they can just wake up and jump in the water for a swim, and the home must be a place their three adult sons will want to visit.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways To Dine
programme.desc: Dining out takes flight into the world of fantasy when host Michael Yo shows us that make-believe experiences can be really tasty. First stop is a restaurant in New York City's Financial District.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life
programme.desc: Today, we'll introduce you to popular 'no-interior' homes. We'll showcase the 'Self-Made 3 No House,' where unnecessary elements are completely removed, and the 'Hide-and-Seek House'.

programme.title: The Neighbor Who Saw Too Much
programme.desc: A grounded teen becomes convinced that her hot new neighbour is actually a dangerous killer. When no-one else believes her, she takes matters into her own hands.
